pr.title: Non-Record: 11L Parallel Muon + LeakyReLU² MLP3x + Legal TTT (val_bpb 1.1253)

output.summary: 11L Transformer couples Parallel Muon parameter banking with LeakyReLU² MLP3x and a legal score-first TTT workflow to fine-tune quantized weights.
techniques: Parallel Muon banking plus batched Newton-Schulz optimizer
LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP3x within gated/XSA4 attention stack
Legal score-first TTT with sliding-window scoring then SGD
